meaning: symb [化]镄 (fermium)  调频 FM(frequency modulation) [域] Micronesia,密克罗尼西亚
examples: This is FM stereo one oh three point seven.
We broadcast on ninety-five point nine (95.9) FM.
The broadband FM signals and the narrowband CF signals travel out to a target, reflect from it, and return to the hunting bat.
The Kalenjin-language Kass FM, meanwhile, is broadcasting a song calling for "love and cohesion".
But by 1978, music had migrated to FM, leaving AM in a programming lurch.
